description: You are a shop foreman configuring the diagnostic cart laptop. The browser has 24 unorganized bookmarks left by the previous user. Configure the browser according to the ~/Desktop/cart_setup_guide.txt specification. Delete the 6 personal bookmarks and organize the 18 work bookmarks into four new folders: 'OEM Portals', 'Parts Suppliers', 'Diagnostic Tools', and 'Shop Management'. Add popup exceptions for motorcraftservice.com, acdelcotds.com, and techauthority.com. Create a custom search engine with the keyword 'vin' using the URL 'https://vpic.nhtsa.dot.gov/decoder/Decoder/Submit/VIN?VIN=%s'. Set the default Page Zoom to 125%. Set the download directory to ~/Documents/TSB_Wiring_Diagrams and disable the prompt to ask where to save each file before downloading.
